title: AOS MSG-LOG JSONL Entry
description: Schema for one JSONL line in _COMMUNICATION/_log/messages.log. Each entry records metadata-only for a single messaging operation (send, archive, read). Body content is never logged (privacy policy). Implements C11 from V4_GAP_MATRIX_v1.1.0_AMENDMENT.md W4. Referenced by scripts/validate_msg_log_schema.py and W5 MSG-HARDENING pre-commit hook.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the operation (e.g. 2026-04-30T12:00:00.123456Z)

op.description: Operation type: send=message created, archive=message moved to archive/, read=inbox list

msg_id.description: Message identifier. For send/archive: MSG-HUB-YYYYMMDD-NNN. For read (inbox list): 'inbox:{to_team}' or empty string if no specific msg.

type.description: MSG type per ADR043 HUB_MSG_SCHEMA.json. One of the canonical types or 'unknown' if unavailable at log time.

project_id.description: Project/domain scope of the operation. 'agents-os' for hub operations; spoke project id for multi-domain (ADR043 §6).

sender_engine.description: Engine that invoked the operation (e.g. 'claude-code', 'codex', 'cursor', 'unknown'). 'unknown' when caller does not supply X-Actor-Engine header.

success.description: True if the operation completed without error; false if it raised an exception or returned an error code.

error_code.description: Error code string on failure (e.g. 'MSG_NOT_FOUND', 'ALREADY_ARCHIVED', 'UNKNOWN_PROJECT'); null on success.

bytes.description: File size in bytes from filesystem stat() — never content. 0 for read operations (no file write). 0 on failure before write.

channel.description: Delivery channel: 'api'=API endpoint handled this op; 'file_fallback'=direct filesystem write used (F9 detection field per ADR043 §5).
